text.title: GKE Cluster Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the gcp-gke-architecture methodology end-to-end.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect all `Prerequisites` artefacts; validate each is non-empty and within freshness window.
step.output: inputs/ bundle ready for the methodology
step.decision-gate: If any prerequisite missing or stale, STOP and return reason.

step.name: apply-core-rules
step.action: Walk the 01-core-rules.xml ruleset top-to-bottom; for each rule mark PASS / FAIL / N/A with evidence.
step.decision-gate: If any MUST rule FAILs without an exception, branch to remediation.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.action: Fill the canonical template for `produces=spec` with the verified values; do not include placeholder tokens.
step.output: draft artefact conforming to the 02-output-contract schema
step.decision-gate: Self-check against schema; if invalid, return to step 2.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run the validator script; capture violations and resolve them in-line.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, STOP and surface violations.

step.name: publish-and-record
step.action: Persist the artefact to the system of record (PR, runbook, dashboard) and link the rules-trace + validator log alongside.
step.decision-gate: If publication target rejects the artefact, escalate to owner named in `maintainers`.
